headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' cdn.jsdelivr.net www.googletagmanager.com www.google-analytics.com; connect-src * blob:; img-src * data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
